emails.subject: FW: California counsel
emails.body: Christian: What do you think about Pat's response? Sara

emails.subject: FW: California counsel
emails.body: Christian: What do you think about Pat's response? Sara

emails.subject: RE: California counsel
emails.body: I would do this: My suggestion would be to seek an opinion from Glendale's outside financing counsel. That should give you a clear signal whether outside counsel with independent skin in the game is willing to back the City's opinion
